name: LONZA GROUP UNSP.ADR 1/10
summary: LONZA GROUP UNSP.ADR 1/10 represents an American Depositary Receipt (ADR) for Lonza Group. Lonza Group is a Swiss multinational company specializing in pharmaceuticals, biotechnology and specialty ingredients. The company provides products and services to the pharmaceutical, healthcare and life sciences industries and is headquartered in Basel, Switzerland.
